highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.116.0 is the first stable v3 release, built on Skia milestone 116 with .NET 9, WinUI and Blazor support.
highlights_body: This release is the culmination of the six-preview v3 line: it removes the v2 [Obsolete] surface, moves to Skia m116, refreshes every bundled native dependency, and adds first-class WPF, WinUI, MAUI and Blazor views alongside .NET 9 and Mac Catalyst Metal. Please review the breaking changes before upgrading.

breaking.title: Obsolete v2 APIs removed
breaking.body: Every member marked [Obsolete] in SkiaSharp 2 has been removed — including the legacy GRContext.Create/GRGlInterface.Assemble* factories, the SKBitmap.GetAddr*/Index8 helpers, the InstallPixels overload that took an SKColorTable, and GetRecommendedSampleCount/SetResourceCacheLimits. Move to the replacement each obsolete attribute pointed at (CreateGl/CreateOpenGl/GetPixel/GetResourceCacheLimit) before upgrading.

breaking.title: SKFilterQuality replaced by SKSamplingOptions
breaking.body: The v2 SKFilterQuality drawing paths were replaced with SKSamplingOptions in v3. Compatibility overloads are provided that keep SKFilterQuality-based calls compiling and map to the equivalent sampling options, but new code should use SKSamplingOptions directly.

bullets.detail: Bumps the bundled Skia through milestones 115 and 116, matching upstream Chrome Stable.
Exposes SKBlender, the R-tree overload of BeginRecording, additional SKPicture APIs, and SKImage.ToRawShader for advanced rendering pipelines.
Binds the Skottie Animation.Builder and cleans up SKTextBlobBuilder/SKRunBuffer, and brings back text-based blobs.
Adds Span<T> overloads to the color filters, SetRectRadii, and SKMatrix helpers, and adds GetPixelSpan with offsets.
Adds SKGLElement to WPF, SKGLView for MAUI, WinUI accelerated views, and DPI on the Blazor components.
Rewrites the interop layer around function pointers and LibraryImport for better AOT and trimming behaviour.
Fixes memory leaks in the MAUI views, an AVE when disposing a cloned SKPaint, and the GetKerningPairAdjustments API.
SKXamlCanvas now handles unloaded XamlRoot, Uno Skia uses Bgra8888, the Uno canvas context stays active while rendering, and WASM no longer fails when the canvas cannot be found.
Uses Metal as the backend on Mac Catalyst and fixes Snapshot returning magenta on Apple Metal.
Restores the v2.88.8 behaviour of SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions.
Adds .NET 9 support alongside .NET 8, updates the SDK/workloads/projects, and refreshes the WinForms GLControl packages.
Adds multi-threaded and SIMD WebAssembly variants and fixes the Blazor import for apps with a base path.

bullets.lead: Metal APIs on a common TFM
bullets.detail: Brings the Metal APIs onto a common .NET TFM across Apple platforms.
Updates IBufferByteAccess for AOT and marks PlatformConfiguration properties trimmable.
Updates HarfBuzz to 8.3.0, libwebp to 1.3.2, libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0, and pulls in the fontconfig refresh via the m116 bump.

contributor_summaries.jeromelaban: .NET 9 support, the SKXamlCanvas XamlRoot fix, the Uno canvas context/WASM canvas fixes and the nosimd build restore.
contributor_summaries.maxkatz6: Function pointers and LibraryImport interop rewrite, common Metal TFM, and trimmable PlatformConfiguration properties.
contributor_summaries.Youssef1313: SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads, the SetRectRadii Span overload, and the Uno Skia Bgra8888 fix.
contributor_summaries.alexandrvslv: Added Span<SKPoint> overloads for SKMatrix.MapPoints/MapVectors and SKPath.AddPoly.
contributor_summaries.beto-rodriguez: Exposed DPI on the Blazor components.
contributor_summaries.Fxplorer: Fixed a typo in the README.
contributor_summaries.jeremy-visionaid: Fixed the access-violation when disposing a cloned SKPaint.
contributor_summaries.sungaila: Restored the v2.88.8 SKBitmap.Encode PNG behaviour.
contributor_summaries.taublast: Fixed the magenta Snapshot result on Apple Metal.

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 modernised the repository, removed the [Obsolete] surface, updated the Skottie/HarfBuzz/libjpeg-turbo/webp dependencies, and set up the new packaging.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 bound the Skottie Animation.Builder, added SKImage.ToRawShader, and switched Mac Catalyst to Metal.
preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 brought the Metal APIs onto a common TFM, added SKGLElement for WPF, DPI on the Blazor components, and the Apple Metal magenta fix.
preview_summaries.p4: Preview 4 added SKBlender, the R-tree BeginRecording overload, more SKPicture APIs, the color-filter Span overloads, and fixed the AVE in cloned SKPaint dispose.
preview_summaries.p5: Preview 5 added .NET 9 support, .NET 8 workload updates, the SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads, and fixed MAUI view memory leaks.
preview_summaries.p6: Preview 6 added the Skia m116 bump, multi-threaded/SIMD WebAssembly, and the SKMatrix/SKPath Span<SKPoint> overloads.

harfbuzz_summary: Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.0 and picks up the .NET 9 support, the function-pointer/LibraryImport rewrite, and the multi-thread/SIMD WebAssembly variants in the HarfBuzzSharp binding.
